- 🔵 General information, not related with the interaction but the story and management
- **🔵 NFTUS** = NOT FOR THIS USER STORY:  CONTEXT THAT MAY HELP WHEN MAKING DECISIONS BUT THAT IS OUT OF THE SCOPE OF THIS USER STORY.
- 🟡 Interactions that are yet to confirm.
- ❓Questions that arise and are yet to face

### 📜 Description



### 👆 Interaction

### 🛠️ Technical notes

Any context or information to help to understand the functionality, written in "technical terms".

### 🤔 Unknowns and challenges

Any subject that we don’t have enough information about, we don’t know how to deal with yet, or that is expected to be more complicated than it seems, relevant to highlight.                           
 

### ☕ Requirements

Technological dependencies, third parties, login, external APIs endpoints…

Is there data to be saved/memorized (eg: states, settings…). If so, at what level?:

- [ ] Settings (user)
- [ ] Team
- [ ] Project
- [ ] File

### 🖥️ How to test

Description of acceptance tests covering many cases of functionality such as empty states, corner cases or wrong data and other more-technical tests such as forcing performance or security flaws.

### 🦄 How to demo

Step by step description of every flow that has to be demoed
